calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Jaime Ritton of the law offices of Hunt & Henriques (408-677-5856) appears as counsel for judgment creditor/opposing party, Bank of America/FIA Card Services

No other appearance is made in this matter

No appearance by claimant/judgment debtor. Claimant, Kevin D. Diep'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is DENIED. Court orders wage garnishment in the amount of $241.75 per pay period. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR No: 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jason Chou, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
Court graned Plaintiff's Oral Motion for Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) KEVIN D. DIEP.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $27,458.87
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $619.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $28,077.87
Judgment signed in open court.
